title: Cobble Collector
description: A small-ish pack designed for great adventures, mythical finds, and vast collections while staying (relatively) light on your computer.
body:
I designed this modpack to play with my friends!

Cobble Collector is for the adventurer who wants to explore the world with a gaggle of misfits, a crowd of buddies, or a party of battle companions. You can:

1. **Become the best like no one ever was.** Raise a menagerie of Cobblemon, laviathans, dinosaurs, creepers, and dozens of other wondrous beasts to make the world yours! Will you build an army of axolotls, or make your dream zoo?
2. **Conquer the darkest depths, highest heights, and deep past.** Make the unknown known through your own airship, rocket, and research lab. What will you find?
3. **Bring a taste of your adventures back home.** Prepare exotic foods from both exotic flora and fauna that you will learn to cultivate. Can you make the best food the world has chewed on?
4. **Enjoy a Minecraft experience familiar and unfamiliar all the same.** Cobble Collector aims to have a vibe similar to vanilla Minecraft but with added quality-of-life features that make your immersion just a little bit more immersive (and convenient).
